summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one early line clarifies why Gavin chooses Babbling as the risk, and one closing line points the denser later pages toward the next chapter's return to deeper manuscript work.
edits: Added a single-sentence bridge naming Babbling as the person Gavin is willing to risk showing one page.
Added a final sentence linking the later pages' changed density to the common room no longer feeling sufficient, setting up the next chapter's move back toward the sub-collection.
